name: Yuxiang Ma
bio_short: Collaborate with The Second Affiliated Hospital of Guangzhou Medical University on epilepsy and traveling wave research, focusing on SEEG data analysis in neuroscience studies.
bio_long: I closely collaborate with The Second Affiliated Hospital of Guangzhou Medical University as a core member of the research group. My main research focuses on epilepsy and neural traveling wave mechanisms in the brain. I specialize in processing, analyzing and interpreting invasive SEEG electrophysiological data to support clinical and translational neuroscience studies.
